arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold Real Madrid latest - La Liga threats, Liverpool pledge and contract claim
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold continues to be heavily linked with a move to Real Madrid, with his Liverpool contract set to expire this summer

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Liverpool eye Núñez/Isak swap, Man United want former Man City striker
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Unai Emery pays Liverpool ultimate compliment as he delivers verdict on Aston Villa draw
arts.sum: Unai Emery offers his reaction after his Aston Villa drew 2-2 at home to Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Unai Emery issues Aston Villa refusal as Boubacar Kamara point raised after 2-2 draw with Liverpool
arts.sum: Unai Emery insists he will never punish his players for their mistakes after Andres Garcia made an error which led to Liverpool's opening goal in tonight's 2-2 thriller at Villa Park. In his post-match press conference Emery was asked about Garcia's mistake, and said: "The same problem we were having two years ago and sometimes last year, but we are trying to analyse and get better.

arts.ttl: Title race: Is the door open for Arsenal after Liverpool drop more points?
arts.sum: Title-chasing Liverpool extended their lead at the top of the Premier League on Wednesday night, taking an early lead against Aston Villa before coming from behind to earn a point as Villa Park played host to one of the most exciting matches of the season so far. Smashing home the match’s opening goal, Salah now has scored 15 away goals, more than any other player in a single season in Premier League history and the most by a Liverpool player in any league campaign since 1930/31.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Darwin Nunez admission after Liverpool miss vs Aston Villa - 'I think you know'
arts.sum: Arne Slot was unsurprisingly asked about Darwin Nunez after the Liverpool forward's costly miss in the 2-2 draw at Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Nunez's latest costly miss could yet harm Liverpool's title push
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez has had more disastrous moments than great ones during his time at Liverpool, but Wednesday's misses felt particularly painful in the context of the Reds' title push.

arts.ttl: 'Not happy' - how title race looks as Slot rues Liverpool draw
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says it was two points dropped in the Premier League title race after a draw at Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: Arne Slot 'firmly' in race with Manchester City for Trent Alexander-Arnold replacment
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly identify a replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold in the event that he leaves Anfield, but the club will face competition from Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend slams Darwin Nunez after 'one of the worst misses of the year' saw Reds drop points at Aston Villa in the title race as Arne Slot admits striker is 'feeling quite down'
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT VILLA PARK: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez was left down and dejected after missing an open goal to win the game at Aston Villa on Wednesday night.
